email.subject: PayPal Security Alert: Unauthorized sign-in attempt
email.body_text:
PayPal

We noticed an unauthorized sign-in attempt from an unrecognized device.

Location: Moscow, Russia
Date: July 7, 2026
IP Address: 192.168.1.100

If this wasn't you, your account may have been compromised. Please review your recent activity and confirm your identity to avoid account suspension.

Click here to confirm: https://paypal.com/confirm-identity

If you do not confirm within 24 hours, your account will be permanently restricted.
